nodes.name: 普埃布拉州
nodes.summary: 普埃布拉州是图谱中的地点节点，当前关联2种鸟类，包括Clark's grebe、West Mexican chachalaca，主要用于表示这些物种的分布地、停歇地或观测地。

nodes.summary: 索諾拉州是图谱中的地点节点，当前关联5种鸟类，包括Gambel's quail、Elegant quail、Clark's grebe等5种鸟类，主要用于表示这些物种的分布地、停歇地或观测地。

nodes.name: LC
nodes.summary: LC表示 IUCN 无危等级，当前关联1443种鸟类，如鸵鸟、鸸鹋、南方鶴鴕等1443种鸟类。

nodes.name: 䴙䴘目
nodes.summary: 䴙䴘目（Podicipediformes）是图谱中的目级分类节点，当前关联19种鸟类，如Titicaca grebe、白簇鸊鷉、小鸊鷉等19种鸟类。

nodes.name: 哈利斯科州
nodes.summary: 哈利斯科州是图谱中的地点节点，当前关联4种鸟类，包括Elegant quail、Clark's grebe、Lesser roadrunner等4种鸟类，主要用于表示这些物种的分布地、停歇地或观测地。

nodes.name: 鷿鷈科
nodes.summary: 鷿鷈科（Podicipedidae）是图谱中的科级分类节点，当前关联19种鸟类，如Titicaca grebe、白簇鸊鷉、小鸊鷉等19种鸟类。

nodes.name: 加利福尼亚湾
nodes.summary: 加利福尼亚湾是图谱中的地点节点，当前关联2种鸟类，包括Clark's grebe、红喉潜鸟，主要用于表示这些物种的分布地、停歇地或观测地。

nodes.name: Clark's grebe
nodes.summary: Clark's grebe（Clark's grebe，学名 Aechmophorus clarkii），分类上属于䴙䴘目，并归入鷿鷈科，在图谱中标记为无危（LC）物种，已关联7个分布地点节点。

nodes.summary: 全球生物多樣性資訊機構是图谱中的地点节点，当前关联1种鸟类，包括Clark's grebe，主要用于表示这些物种的分布地、停歇地或观测地。

links.target: loc-全球生物多樣性資訊機構-1874ed69
links.label: 分布于
links.evidence: In the US and Canada breeding is done across a large portion of the west of these two countries, spanning from British Columbia to Texas, for which the grebes tend to favour larger bodies of water and congregate in large flocks. Storer and Nuechterlein in 1992 dubiously claim the birds winter in Central America, as well as in Mexico and some regions of California. Out of almost 100,000 records of this taxon logged at the Global Biodiversity Information Facility there are zero records found south of northern Oaxaca, Mexico.{{cite journal |url=https://www.gbif.org/species/2482032 |title=Aechmophorus clarkii (Lawrence, 1858) |author= |date=2017 |website=GBIF Backbone Taxonomy

links.label: 分布于
links.evidence: In the US and Canada breeding is done across a large portion of the west of these two countries, spanning from British Columbia to Texas, for which the grebes tend to favour larger bodies of water and congregate in large flocks. Storer and Nuechterlein in 1992 dubiously claim the birds winter in Central America, as well as in Mexico and some regions of California. Out of almost 100,000 records of this taxon logged at the Global Biodiversity Information Facility there are zero records found south of northern Oaxaca, Mexico.{{cite journal |url=https://www.gbif.org/species/2482032 |title=Aechmophorus clarkii (Lawrence, 1858) |author= |date=2017 |website=GBIF Backbone Taxonomy

links.label: 分布于
links.evidence: Checklist dataset |publisher=GBIF Secretariat |doi=10.15468/39omei |access-date=25 November 2018}} The range of this bird in Mexico is distributed in two streaks southward; one from the California border along the Pacific coast throughout Baja California and across the gulf along the coast to southern Sonora, the other a higher altitude, inland distribution running down from the Big Bend region behind the Texas border down the mountains of central Mexico, with the highest concentration in population in the south from Jalisco to Puebla and northern Oaxaca, where the distribution abruptly ceases
